sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42866" key="e)rwtopai/gnion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρωτο-παίγνιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, in pl., title of <sense id="n42866.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">amatory poems</tr_> by Laevius, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Gell.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.24.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
